title: geum involucratum
intro: Geum involucratum, also known as the New Zealand geum, is a flowering plant species native to New Zealand. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to treat skin conditions such as eczema, acne, and minor wounds due to its astringent and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Geum involucratum include its potential to soothe and calm irritated skin, reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Geum involucratum can be prepared as a topical herbal remedy, often used in the form of salves, ointments, or infusions, allowing for direct application to affected areas.
